Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Frozen Blade]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Frozen Blade team is expected to be retrieved in approximately eight months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Frozen Blade school is a vassal faction under the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Sage of the Frozen Blade is a known figure to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Sage of the Frozen Blade has a sword against the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Sage of the Frozen Blade is also referred to as the Winter Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Frozen Blade students are ranked in the thirties.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — The Frozen Blade team has constructs that can detect Lindon's construct signature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Only one competitor from the Frozen Blade made it out of the second round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Frozen Blade students are in the arena.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Frozen Blade sect/group will get Yerin to Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Frozen Blade women are part of the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Frozen Blade is a technique that uses shards of Frozen Blade madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin activated the Frozen Blade madra technique.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Frozen Blade madra left a tower-sized sword in the ground.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Sage of the Frozen Blade gave Yerin a basic language construct during the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King was reinforcing his technique on the Sage of the Frozen Blade.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Min Shuei is the Sage of the Frozen Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Sage of the Frozen Blade has a sect.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
